Resolve a PDF file path using a cascade of fallback strategies

Source: R/run_app.R
resolve_pdf_path.Rd

Given a path as stored in the database, tries in order:

  1. The stored path as-is

  2. Relative to the directory containing the .db file

  3. Relative to the project root (found by walking up from the db dir)

  4. Relative to the working directory when run_app() was called

  5. basename resolved inside pdf_dir (explicit override)

Usage

resolve_pdf_path(stored_path, db_conn, pdf_dir = NULL, user_wd = NULL)

Arguments

stored_path

File path as stored in the database

db_conn

Path to the .db file (used to anchor relative paths)

pdf_dir

Optional explicit PDF directory override

user_wd

Working directory captured at run_app() time

Value

Resolved absolute path, or NULL if not found
